functions.name: bulk_transfer_areas_with_audit
functions.args: p_old_assets jsonb, p_new_assets jsonb, p_action_type audit_action_type, p_user_id text, p_before_data jsonb, p_after_data jsonb, p_description text
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.bulk_transfer_areas_with_audit(p_old_assets jsonb, p_new_assets jsonb, p_action_type audit_action_type DEFAULT 'transfer_area'::audit_action_type, p_user_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_before_data jsonb DEFAULT NULL::jsonb, p_after_data jsonb DEFAULT NULL::jsonb, p_description text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
v_audit_id bigint;
v_asset jsonb;
v_asset_id bigint;
v_building_number bigint;
v_affected_asset_ids bigint[] := ARRAY[]::bigint[];
v_result jsonb;
BEGIN
SELECT log_audit_entry(
p_action_type,
'bulk_asset',
NULL::text,
p_user_id,
p_before_data,
p_after_data,
p_description
) INTO v_audit_id;

FOR v_asset IN SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_old_assets)
LOOP
v_asset_id := (v_asset->>'asset_id')::bigint;
v_building_number := (v_asset->>'building_number')::bigint;

INSERT INTO assets_history (
building_number, payer_id, asset_id, measurement_date,
main_asset_type, asset_size,
sub_asset_type_1, sub_asset_size_1,
sub_asset_type_2, sub_asset_size_2,
sub_asset_type_3, sub_asset_size_3,
sub_asset_type_4, sub_asset_size_4,
sub_asset_type_5, sub_asset_size_5,
sub_asset_type_6, sub_asset_size_6,
structure_drawing_url, elevator, single_double_family,
condo, townhouses, penthouse, tax_region,
floor, discount_type, discount_date_from, discount_date_to,
created_at, history_created_at, business_distribution_area, exported_to_automation
)
SELECT
building_number, payer_id, asset_id, measurement_date,
main_asset_type, asset_size,
sub_asset_type_1, sub_asset_size_1,
sub_asset_type_2, sub_asset_size_2,
sub_asset_type_3, sub_asset_size_3,
sub_asset_type_4, sub_asset_size_4,
sub_asset_type_5, sub_asset_size_5,
sub_asset_type_6, sub_asset_size_6,
structure_drawing_url, elevator, single_double_family,
condo, townhouses, penthouse, tax_region,
floor, discount_type, discount_date_from, discount_date_to,
created_at, now(), business_distributi...
